views.markdown:
# TweetDownloader

One-tap, best-quality media downloader for the official Twitter/X app.

Open a photo or video, then tap the download button in the fullscreen viewer to save that media directly to your camera roll.

## Features

- Download button in the fullscreen photo viewer that saves the photo currently displayed
- Download button in the fullscreen video player that saves the video currently displayed
- Subtle icon tint changes from muted white to soft green after a successful save
- Download indicators last only for the current Twitter session and reset when the app restarts
- Photos are saved at `:orig` (original) quality, not the downscaled timeline preview
- Videos are saved at the highest available bitrate
- Saves straight to the camera roll, no confirmation dialog
- A small percentage HUD in the top-left shows download progress

## Compatibility

- Confirmed working on Twitter app 11.93 (`com.atebits.Tweetie2`). Probably works fine on other versions though.
- Rootless jailbreak (Dopamine), iOS 15+ (probably very easy to convert to rootfull im just very lazy)

## Install

Add `https://mikey820.github.io/repo/` to Sileo/Zebra and install **TweetDownloader**.

## Building from source

```bash
make package FINALPACKAGE=1 THEOS_PACKAGE_SCHEME=rootless
```

Requires [Theos](https://theos.dev) with the iOS 16.5 SDK.

## How it works

TweetDownloader hooks only Twitter's fullscreen slideshow and immersive-player view controllers. It resolves the media currently on screen, upgrades photo URLs to `:orig` quality or selects the highest-bitrate MP4 video variant, and queues the item through a small download manager that reports progress and saves it to the camera roll via `PHPhotoLibrary`. Successful saves are tracked in memory so the corresponding icon can use its downloaded tint until Twitter exits.

### v1.2.0

Subtle fullscreen photo/video download buttons for Twitter/X, with an in-session color indicator for media already saved. No buttons on the timeline. Twitter 11.93, Dopamine rootless (arm64/arm64e).

---

### v1.1.0

Fullscreen photo/video download buttons for Twitter/X, with no buttons on the timeline. Saves the currently viewed media at the best available quality. Twitter 11.93, Dopamine rootless (arm64/arm64e).

---

### v1.0.0

Always-on top-right download button for Twitter/X. Best-quality photo/video to camera roll. Twitter 11.93, Dopamine rootless (arm64/arm64e).
